activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping or poisoned. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Cursed Sleep or Lethal Poison status effects. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All non-burning, non-poisoned, non-sleeping enemies hit are then randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

activeSkills.name: Time Spears
activeSkills.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If the target has 50TU or more, or if Time Stop is active, deals 600% damage.

If Time Stop is not active, Stuns the target for 300TU, then if the hit target has 200TU or more and is not a Stun Absorber, they can no longer be Stunned by Time Spears skill unless they leave the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Time Stop
activeSkills.description:
Activates Time Stop For 100TU. While Time Stop is active, the user:
- Cannot be defeated by Poison or Burn damage (including Lethal Poison).
- Is immune to Poison, and Burn status effects.
- Has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This does not stack with Quicken effects.
- Disables the Active Skills of all other units on the battlefield (including new units that enter from reinforcements).

When Time Stop expires, all allies will be healed for 100% of max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and all non-boss enemies on the battlefield that are below 10% of their max HP will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Time Stop expiring may trigger before or after other effects.

Usable once per battle. The effects of Time Stop cannot be Purified and will be cancelled if the user is defeated. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping.

activeSkills.name: Undo Existence
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 2 non-boss enemies that have 300TU or more, (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). Then for each enemy that is defeated, Allies gain 2 Spirit. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if 2 or more enemies have 300TU or more and only once per battle.

activeSkills.name: Sands of Time
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Storm of Blades
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 400% damage instead and the user will immediately get the next turn. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Stun Barrage
activeSkills.description: Stun a random enemy for 100TU, this effect triggers 4 times. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to trigger this effect 8 times instead. This skill locks after each use until the user defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack. Usable 3 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Divine Blast
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. If at least one of the hit enemies is not defeated by this attack, the user gains a Power Charge. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Lethal Plague
activeSkills.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Lethal Poison status effect, and Infects them with it.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Lethal Poison to a random non-burning, non-Lethal Poisoned unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

This skill is locked for 100TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Throw Knives
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 random enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit has its Poison Wards removed, burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Super Poison, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Massacre
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 400% total damage). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

activeSkills.name: Queen's Slash
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 400% or 600% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Afternoon Tea
activeSkills.description:
Grants all enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then for each enemy that is not asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 3 Spirit.

This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. If all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

activeSkills.name: Dream Shatter
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and does not wake sleeping targets. If the target is sleeping, deals 600% damage. Then if the hit target is sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral and has 1HP remaining, it is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Dark Drain
activeSkills.description:
Grants all allies Stealth, and a Burn Ward. Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each Poisoned enemy on the battlefield. The user will immediately get the next turn, then this additional turn effect cannot trigger again until TU advances.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Degrading Slice
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 2 enemies depending on the enemy team's Spirit:
- 6+ Enemy Spirit: 250%
- 4-5 Enemy Spirit: 400%
- 1-3 Enemy Spirit: 550%
- 0 Enemy Spirit: 700%
This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Unleash Chaos
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies for 1000% of the user's attack. Steals all Spirit from the enemy team. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Then the user enters Chaos Rage for 100TU. While in Chaos Rage, the user's attack is increased by 1.5x (this does not stack with Enrage effects), and the user cannot fall asleep, or be stunned. The user cannot enter Chaos Rage while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills on the battlefield.

This skill is locked until the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and is locked again after each use. This skill can be used only three times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Lightning Bolts
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Then the user becomes Enraged. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used any other active skill since this skill was last used.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

activeSkills.name: Divine Winds
activeSkills.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit, then ally Spirit is doubled. Enemy Spirit is halved (rounded down) then enemies lose 1 Spirit. (e.g. Enemies have 7 Spirit -> 3 then minus 1 = 2).

All allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

activeSkills.name: Divine Lightning
activeSkills.description:
Targets all enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, all non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemies hit that have 1HP remaining have a 25% chance each to be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Call the Storm
activeSkills.description: Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Denmoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has used Divine Lightning while on the battlefield. Usable five times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Mega Poison Jolt
activeSkills.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. All enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU and are Stunned for 30TU. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Shadow Rift
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. If an enemy is poisoned, deals 400% damage. If the user has survived for 200TU+ on the battlefield, 600% damage instead. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt.

activeSkills.name: Crippling Toxin
activeSkills.description:
Stuns 1 Mega Poisoned enemy for 200TU. Then, grants them a Burn Ward and the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. These effects can only apply if the target is Mega Poisoned. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. Usable only if there is no more than 1 enemy with the Lethal Poison status effect on the battlefield, and cannot be used if there is a non-Mega Poisoned enemy Stun Absorber on the battlefield.

Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Lunar Hypnosis
activeSkills.description:
Hypnotizes an enemy with the lowest TU and Mega Poisons them for 200TU. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end.

This skill becomes locked for 90TU after use (minus 10TU per Awakening the user has) and cannot be used if an enemy is already Hypnotized or if there are less than 2 enemies on the battlefield. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the user is defeated or leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Tandem Takedown
activeSkills.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if another ally on the battlefield has 50TU or less. Then immediately give an ally with the lowest TU (excluding the user) the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn. The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

activeSkills.name: En Garde
activeSkills.description:
Weakens all enemies. The user is Enraged, granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Counter Stance for 150TU and 80% damage reduction from attacks until the end of its next turn. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Weak or Enrage skills on affected units, and other status effects on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Double Phoenix
activeSkills.description: 700% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Unlocked for one use each time the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and can be used only three times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Suppressing Fire
activeSkills.description:
Weakens all enemies, and grants them a Rage Ward. Enrages all allies. Then immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Ironclad
activeSkills.description: The user is Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and healed for 100% of max HP. For 100TU, the user cannot be defeated and is immune to Poison, Burn and Sleep status effects. When this effect expires, all other allies will be healed for 100% of their max HP and be Purified. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield, and only if there is no other non-Mori Guardian on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Victory Cannon
activeSkills.description:
1500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy or non-conjured ally is defeated or sacrificed by any source other than the user. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

activeSkills.name: Sound the Alarm
activeSkills.description: Grants 2 random enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Suimori to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 3 if the user has only 1 other ally on the battlefield). Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and cannot be used if the user has no other allies on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Circuit Overload
activeSkills.description:
Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU:
- Steals 1 Spirit from enemies if that target is hit.
- Deals 500% damage to that target instead.
- Deals 750% damage to that target instead if the target has 100+TU.

activeSkills.name: Mass Surge
activeSkills.description:
Heals the user for 30% of max HP, and the user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. All other allies heal for 100% of their max HP. Then all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and granted Recovery Mist for 200TU. Usable 10 times per battle.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

activeSkills.name: Modular Shot
activeSkills.description:
1250% damage to 2 enemies. Unlocked each time an ally on the battlefield is defeated by an attack while this unit is on the battlefield. If that ally was:
- Water, this attack grants hit targets Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
- Fire, this attack grants all allies the Burn status effect.
- Storm, this attack grants hit targets Stun for 200TU.
- Earth, this attack grants hit targets Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
- Light, this attack heals all allies for 100% of max HP and Purifies them.
- Dark, this attack grants hit targets Mega Poison for 200TU.
Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. The Elemental effect will be determined at the time this skill unlocks. When multiple allies are defeated at the same time, only one Element will be considered.

activeSkills.name: Blot Out
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 1 enemy and Weaken them. Then enemies lose Spirit equal to the number of Element types that remain on the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Paint Fall
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, the Stealth Status Effect, and the Counter Stance Status Effect. Randomly grants all allies either Stun Wards, or Sleep Wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Then heals all allies for 200% of the user's attack. This triggers once for each Element type that remains on the battlefield.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Stroke of Genius
activeSkills.description: Damage 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. 300% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefiled. 400% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Masterpiece
activeSkills.description:
Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all 6 Element types are on the battlefield. Usable twice per battle.

activeSkills.name: Dragon Fang
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 2 Enemies, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Incinerate since this skill was last used.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Burn will gain the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Dragon Breath
activeSkills.description:
Enrages 2 allies, grants them the burn status effect, and heals them for 100% of max HP. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

activeSkills.name: Incinerate
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Rising Dragon
activeSkills.description: Grants all enemies the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Himoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Demon Hellball
activeSkills.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% total damage). This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user and target are both granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

Stuns for 50TU one other non-water, burning enemy per Charge stored on the user (max of 3 targets).

activeSkills.name: Mass Dismissal
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats all conjured, non-boss units on both sides of the battlefield. Allies gain 2 Spirit and the enemy team loses 2 Spirit for each unit defeated in this way. The user is considered to have defeated with attacks as many units as are defeated this way (even if they were Ephemeral). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the targets from being defeated. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Devil's Fury
activeSkills.description:
200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% damage). This attack ignores the Stealth status effect, and effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield or if all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

activeSkills.name: Star Sweep
activeSkills.description: 250% damage to all enemies and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Steals up to 1 Spirit from enemies for each enemy hit.

activeSkills.name: Cosmic Cannon
activeSkills.description:
Consumes a Power Charge. 400% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

If damage from this attack defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Astral Ascension
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies, the user is granted Recovery Mist for 100TU and cannot be Stunned for 100TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. If damage is dealt to 2 targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Usable if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

activeSkills.name: Grand Design
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack. The user is granted a Power Charge.

The user gains one of the following effects at random:
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target(s) from being defeated.
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield immediately gives the user the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Clean Strike
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead and this unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Sakura Storm since this skill was last used. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

activeSkills.name: Sakura Storm
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% total damage). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Healing Blossom
activeSkills.description:
Heals the user fully, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. If the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

Endure effects cannot stack. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Swallow's Flight
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has survived for 200TU or more on the battlefield, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if the user has 2+ Charges stored and only 3 times per battle. Consumes 2 Charges on the user.

activeSkills.name: Fireworks
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements if a Shadow Double is not next in line in allied reinforcements. This Shadow Double's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the next unit in allied reinforcements. Usable if this unit's active skill Assassinate is locked.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Flank
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy, and immediately gives 1 other random ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.

activeSkills.name: Assassinate
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user enters the battle from reinforcements. This skill is locked again after each use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Art of Cloning
activeSkills.description:
Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements, and adds another 6 Shadow Doubles to random places in allied reinforcements. These Shadow Doubles' Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessories will match the user.

Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user sends themself to the back of allied reinforcements.

Usable if the user has been on the battlefield since the very start of battle, or if there are no allied reinforcements. Cannot be used if there are any Shadow Doubles among allies on the battlefield or allied reinforcements.

activeSkills.name: Cursed Bouquet
activeSkills.description:
Grants 1 non-burning enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth status effect.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Rampage
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has defeated 1+ enemies with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect.

activeSkills.name: Finishing Slam
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. Deals 200% damage for each time the user has used Stealth Rampage while on the battlefield, up to 600% max after 3 uses. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user uses Stealth Rampage. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

activeSkills.name: Full Charge+
activeSkills.description:
Heals the user fully. The user is granted 3 Charges, and a Poison Ward. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Ocean Sweep
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each sleeping enemy (500% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects and removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from all hit targets.

activeSkills.name: Pacifying Wave
activeSkills.description:
Targets 2 enemies. Removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from them, then grants them Burn Wards and the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Endless Nightmare
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. All enemies hit are then granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Royal Trident
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and adds 1 Super Suimori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Removes any Sleep Wards from the target.

This skill becomes locked after use until an ally Suimori gets the turn, or until there are no Suimoris in the ally team.

activeSkills.name: Last Word
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses Healing Words. This lock may be ignored if user is alone on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Healing Words
activeSkills.description:
Heals 2 allies for 800% of the user's attack, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

activeSkills.name: Plot Twist
activeSkills.description: Exchanges 1 enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to next in line of enemy reinforcements. Then add 1 Imposter to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. Usable only if there are 4 enemies on the battlefield. Usable once per battle, and will fail if the target is Immovable.

activeSkills.name: Red Herring
activeSkills.description:
The user becomes a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

After this skill is used, whenever the user is hit by an attack and is defeated or survives with 25% or less of max HP until after the end of the turn:
- They are sacrificed if they were not defeated.
- A copy of the user is added to next in line of ally reinforcements. The copy's Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match the user.
- All allies become Enraged and have their current TU reduced by 100. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

These effects won't trigger if defeated by the burn status effect.

Unlocked the first time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Poison Apple
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead if the target is poisoned or has 100+ TU. All non-poisoned enemies hit are then granted Super Poison.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

activeSkills.name: Toxic Stun Random
activeSkills.description:
Stuns 2 random enemies for 100TU and grants them the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. The user is granted a Sleep ward. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Deadly Magic
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Heals all allies below 50% of max HP for 100% of their max HP. Usable if at least 1 ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP.

activeSkills.name: Survivor's Crash
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Cursed Blade
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. If not burning, that enemy will also be granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, and the user will be granted Sleep Thorns. This attack ignores Guardians and damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This lock may be ignored if allies have 0 Spirit.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying.

activeSkills.name: Cursed Battlecry
activeSkills.description:
All non-burning allies are granted the Armor status effect, Sleep Thorns and become Enraged. Each non-burning, non-sleeping enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU. At the end of the turn, allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy with Mega Poison or Cursed Sleep on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite other status effects and previous Enrage skills on affected units.

activeSkills.name: Cursed Helioslash
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and the Stealth Status Effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Cursed End
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Flame Sweep
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to all enemies, 250% damage instead if the user is burning, or to targets that are burning. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This is not considered a Burn Blast type skill.

activeSkills.name: Binding Flames
activeSkills.description: Burns 1 Enemy, then Stuns them randomly for either 50TU or 200TU if they are Burning. That target is granted a Stun Hex, which will stun all enemies for 100TU at the end of that targets next turn, then be removed. Allies gain 2 Spirit. This skill has no effect if it targets a Water enemy, and is usable only if there is no Stun Hex among enemies. Stun Hexes cannot be purified, and will be removed if the hexed unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Death Blow
activeSkills.description:
750% damage to 1 enemy. The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU if the user is not burning. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if all enemies on the battlefield are burning or if the user is not burning.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

activeSkills.name: Hell's Judgement
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and the user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

At the end of the turn, allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will gain the Burn status effect, and all other allies will have Burn removed. Unlocked each time a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Toxic Shot
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user's HP is at 75%+. Grants the target the Super Poison status effect. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and steals up to 3 Spirit from enemies.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

activeSkills.name: Time Desecrator
activeSkills.description:
100% damage to 1 enemy. If the target has 50+ TU, deals 400% damage instead and grants the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. 600% damage instead with Mega Poison if the target has 100+ TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user is granted Poison and Burn wards.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Unleash Hell
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 450% damage if the user has defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefield, 600% if the user has defeated 2+ units. Grants all Mega Poisoned enemies Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then, grants all Super Poisoned enemies Mega Poison for 200TU. Then grants Super Poison to all other enemies that were hit.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Toxic Shock
activeSkills.description: Stuns 2 enemies for 100TU and grants them the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Mori Sweep
activeSkills.description: Damage to all enemies. Adds 3 Super Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements, and the user's Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on the user.

activeSkills.name: Sacred Blade
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there is an ally Mori on the battlefield or a Mori in the very back of allied reinforcements.

activeSkills.name: Sword Storm
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use unless it defeats an enemy. This skill is also locked again if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Redemption Pulse
activeSkills.description:
Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU, and Purifies (removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison) all allies. Unlocked each time a Mori ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, even if the Mori was Ephemeral. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: First Blood
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has not yet defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 30% of max HP. If an enemy is sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and does not wake up sleeping enemies.

activeSkills.name: Disabling Pulse
activeSkills.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit.

Then if that target is not asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), exchanges them with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. This exchange will fail if the target is Immovable or if there are less than 4 enemies on the battlefield (no imposter will be added). This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill.

activeSkills.name: Royal Fortissimo
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a sleeping target. If damage is dealt to 2 sleeping targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and this skill will become locked until the user damages an enemy with another attack.

activeSkills.name: Royal Grandioso
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. This skill is usable if all enemies are sleeping or if the user has survived 200TU on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Divine Strike
activeSkills.description:
75% Damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each charge the user has stored (600% max). Then the user is granted 1 charge and the Counter Stance status effect for 300TU.

Counter Stance will overwrite other status effects on the user. For 300TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Combo Drive
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies. Heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack if damage is dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Light's Embrace
activeSkills.description: Immediately give all other allies that are below 50% of max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Then heals those allies for 100% of their max HP, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison). The user is granted 1 charge for each affected ally. Usable if at least 1 other ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP and if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Divine Purification
activeSkills.description: Removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison from 1 ally. Then grants them a Purify Chain if there is no Purify Chain among allies. A unit with a Purify Chain will Purify another random ally after their turn, then they will pass the Purify Chain to that ally. Purify Chains will end only if the unit with the Purify Chain is defeated, leaves the battlefield, or falls asleep. This skill becomes locked for 10TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Lantern Flare
activeSkills.description: Damage to 1 Enemy, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Trail of Flames
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead to each burning target. 600% damage instead to each target that is a Guardian. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Meteor Strike
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies, and stuns each enemy that is dealt damage for 100TU. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, the effects of Skin passive skills, and Revenge passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Lantern Festival
activeSkills.description:
All allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills are granted the Burn status effect, and will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills. Then if all allies are burning, the user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. Usable if the user is not burning.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on affected units. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

activeSkills.name: Trinity Thrust
activeSkills.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. Then the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Landslide
activeSkills.description: Targets 2 enemies. 500% damage to targets that are not burning. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Boundless Slash
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and 3 Charges. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

The next damage the user deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

activeSkills.name: Trinity Onslaught
activeSkills.description:
Damage 2 enemies, and then grants those enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU if they are left with below 25% of max HP. 300% damage to targets that have survived 100TU or more, and are not burning. 600% damage to targets that have survived 200TU or more, and are not burning. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Spirit Blast
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and allies randomly gain either 3, 5 or 9 Spirit. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Punisher
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Excessive Force
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect, and allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

activeSkills.name: Veil of Dread
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield, and there is a Guardian among enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Draining Shadow
activeSkills.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Steals up to 2 Spirit from enemies.

This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Dread Fumes
activeSkills.description:
Grants all non-burning allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each Poisoned or Sleeping enemy on the battlefield. Then each non-burning enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

activeSkills.name: Dread Serpent
activeSkills.description: Damages all enemies, 600% damage instead to all Poisoned or Sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. All non-burning, non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

activeSkills.name: Creeping Death
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. Usable only if the user has Stealth. This skill is locked for 150TU after use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Revolution!
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to all enemies, 200% damage if user has survived on the battlefield for 200TU or more. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy hit at 50+ TU in the turn order, or 2 Spirit for each at 100+ TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Stun Cannon
activeSkills.description:
Targets 2 random enemies, they are each randomly granted either Stun for 50TU, 100TU, or 200TU. The user is granted 1 Charge. This skill is locked until the end of the user's next turn after each use.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Time Shockwave
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage if the target has 50TU or more. 600% damage if the target has 100TU or more. 800% damage if the target has 150TU or more. For each target hit but not defeated by this attack, Stun 1 random enemy that was not hit by this attack for 100TU.

activeSkills.name: Glorious Cannon
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% per Awakening the user has (800% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Infect Reality
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Consumes 1 charge on the user and unlocks at random either Mind Piercer or No One Is Safe. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked if the user has no Charges.

activeSkills.name: Mind Piercer
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 random enemy. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: No One Is Safe
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. Sets both enemy and ally Spirit to 5. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Reset Reality
activeSkills.description: The user has all Sleep immunities, Sleep Wards and Stealth Shields removed. Then, the user is healed for 100% of max HP, granted 3 Charges, and Sleep for 100TU, even if they have already slept. A random enemy is also granted Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept. The next time the user is awake at the end of a turn, they will be healed for 100% of max HP, and have their current TU reduced by 100. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

activeSkills.name: Discharge Strike
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted a Sleep Ward. If this hits an enemy with any Discharge Counters, they will be stunned for:

300TU if they have 3 Discharge Counters
200TU if they have 2 Discharge Counters
100TU if they have 1 Discharge Counter

activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if there is an Imposter among enemies on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Dusk Mirage
activeSkills.description: Exchanges 1 enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. If there are no enemy reinforcements, add enough Imposters to the enemy team to still send the targeted enemy to reinforcements (max 3). Usable only if there are at least 2 non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield and becomes locked for 200TU after use. This skill will have no effect if the targeted enemy is Immovable.

activeSkills.name: Dream Weaver
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if there is a sleeping enemy (even if the target is not sleeping). If there are no sleeping enemies, 50% damage instead and allies gain an additional 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill.

activeSkills.name: Lights Out
activeSkills.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. For each targeted enemy that does not fall asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 2 Spirit. Usable only if no enemies are sleeping.

activeSkills.name: Demolition Raid
activeSkills.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

activeSkills.name: Aegis Overload
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to all enemies and heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. All allies will become Enraged and all enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The user will also have their Power Barrier passive skill reactivated and gain a Power Charge. Usable only if the user's Power Barrier passive skill is deactivated and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

- Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
- Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.
- Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Dark Hypnosis
activeSkills.description:
Hypnotizes a random enemy (20%+ chance) and Mega Poisons them for 200TU (100% chance). A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end. The chance of Hypnosis applying increases by 20% for each awakening the user has, up to 100% max when fully awakened.

Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the user is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use and cannot be used if an enemy is already Hypnotized. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Devil's Dance
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to all enemies, and each enemy hit has a 50% chance to be Mega Poisoned for 200TU. This attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Reaping Scythe
activeSkills.description: Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. 400% damage instead against poisoned targets and steals 1 Spirit from enemies for each poisoned enemy hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

activeSkills.name: Survivor's Edict
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy then Mega Poisons them for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Go for the Eyes!
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy and Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). This attack cannot be redirected by enemy Guardians. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

activeSkills.name: Stun Bolt
activeSkills.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 100TU. Usable once per battle and only if there is an ally "Odin, Goddess of All Laws" on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Time Blaster
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy and deals 100% damage minimum. If the target has 50+ TU, deals 300% damage and steals 1 Spirit from enemies. 500% damage and 2 Spirit stolen instead if the target has 100+ TU.

activeSkills.name: Supreme Stun
activeSkills.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 500TU. The user is fully healed and purified (any negative status effects such as Sleep, Burn, or Poison are removed from the user). Usable once per battle.

activeSkills.name: Moonlight
activeSkills.description: 75% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to targets that are sleeping. Allies gain 1 additional Spirit for each sleeping target hit.

activeSkills.name: Gravity Cannon
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Lunar Veil
activeSkills.description: The user gains the Stealth status effect with a Stealth shield. This will overwrite other Status effects on the user. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth or Burn status effects. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shield prevents the next non-stealth status effect the user would gain while Stealthed from applying.

activeSkills.name: Survivor's Barrage
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Chain Stun Chance Attack Single AHimiko
Divine Reflection
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack and Purifies them. Allies other than the user also become Enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and their current TU is reduced by 50 if their current TU is 50 or more.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. When any unit gets the turn after this lock expires, the lowest TU enemy will be stunned for 50TU, and then the user will be Purified (even if sleeping) and get the next turn instead by having their TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

activeSkills.name: Dark Spirit
activeSkills.description: Damage to 1 enemy. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Otherwise, allies gain 2 additional Spirit.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Zone
activeSkills.description:
Each ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill is healed for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack, becomes Enraged, and gains Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each other affected ally. Cannot be used if the user already has both Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

-Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.
-Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.
-Stealth will overwrite other status effects on affected units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on affected units.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Ravager
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Instant Survivor Drain AJeanne Dark Swim
Rallying Queen
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 1 enemy. Allies on the battlefield with active skills that can Stun or Combo Burst type active skills are granted Sleep Wards and become Enraged (this will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies). Combo Burst type active skills also become unlocked for allies on the battlefield.

-Active Attack skills that unlock for one use when their user deals damage with an attack are considered Combo Burst type skills. They will still lock again after use or if their user leaves the battlefield.
-Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

activeSkills.name: Combo Drain+

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield, and will not reduce the user's TU if they are targeted.

activeSkills.name: Regal Pressure

This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Bonds of Agony

activeSkills.name: Swift Strike+

activeSkills.name: Call Morphie

This skill becomes locked once Alice is in Starlight Champion form.

activeSkills.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance and Stealth status effects, revenge passive skills, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

activeSkills.name: Magical Drain
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 100% of its own max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

activeSkills.name: Raging Charge
activeSkills.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted 1 Charge and becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Honnoji Bazooka

This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has stored at least one charge. Consumes 1 charge on the user.

activeSkills.name: Instant Bazooka
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy, heals the user fully and grants 1 Charge to the user. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect. 500% damage and gain 2 Charges instead if there are at least 4 units with the Burn status effect. 600% damage and 3 Charges if there are at least 6 units with burn.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU for each Charge stored by the user after use, up to 150TU for 3 Charges stored.

activeSkills.name: Honnoji Missile
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. The user gains the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and a Stun Ward. Usable only if the user does not have Healing Burn already and has stored at least one charge. Consumes 1 charge on the user.

-A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

activeSkills.name: Spark Blast
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 

25% chance of reducing the user's active skill TU costs by 50% on its next turn. Effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU cost reduction is in effect.

Also grants the user the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

activeSkills.name: Crimson Ward

Burn will overwrite other status effects on that ally. Wards will prevent their named effect from applying to that ally once, then be removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Demon Hellfire

activeSkills.name: Stroke of Death

activeSkills.name: Instant Restoration
activeSkills.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 1 ally, and heals them for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Poison Shock

-This Quicken will overwrite the effects of previous quicken skills on those allies.

Other effects that would cause Allies to lose Spirit may apply before Spirit lost by this skill.
